message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker state for bd-3ar8v perf epic sub-tasks

Updates status and notes across multiple bd-3ar8v sub-beads reflecting
completed implementation work on the PERF-3X performance epic:
autosave queue hardening, V2 rollback error classification, extension
lane telemetry, benchmark stratification pipeline, and fault injection
test suites.
